creator: nbe@renzel.net
text:
is there any way to the disable the bundled bluetooth unit on the AX200 WiFi card? I'd like to rule out bluetooth as a disturbing factor.

When I try setting "compat.linuxkpi.iwlwifi_bt_coex_active=0" via "kenv" or "loader.conf", I get "iwlwifi0: iwlmvm doesn't allow to disable BT Coex, check bt_coex_active module parameter"...
